psychologicalTheme: Zealous crusaders preparing for the Coming. Anxious attachment — needs constant validation that they are righteous. Type 1 (Reformer) with helper wing: driven by righteous anger, convinced of their moral duty. Under stress, becomes moody and withdrawn (Type 4 direction). Very low openness means they are hostile to unfamiliar ideas. Highest sanctity moral foundation — they see the universe through a lens of sacred vs profane. Missionary zeal at first contact, but agreeableness is low enough to wage holy wars.
